constraints.message: RunReceipt.receipt_hash MUST cover the key_set; a mutated key_set breaks the receipt (binds signer identity).
constraints.evaluation_note: Single-record derivation over the four covered fields.

constraints.message: RunReceipt.genesis_anchor MUST be the pinned chain-root literal; no implementation-divergent roots (LG-3b).
constraints.evaluation_note: Literal check; also enforced by the schema's Type.Literal.

constraints.message: RunReceipt.token_hash_sequence MUST be in (gate_index, wave_number) order so verifiers walk the chain deterministically.
constraints.evaluation_note: Order check; requires resolving each token hash to its (gate_index, wave_number).

constraints.expression: receipt_hash is emitted into the loa audit chain via audit_emit at run close
constraints.message: RunReceipt.receipt_hash MUST be externally anchored; retroactive forgery must also rewrite the independent hash-chained signed audit log.
constraints.evaluation_note: Consumer policy — the loa audit chain is the external anchor.
